HGSS.519.0000:
Lance: I’ve been waiting for you.\f
[0103,0000,0000]!\f
I knew that you, with your skills,
would eventually reach me here.\f
There’s no need for words now.\f
We will battle to determine who is
the stronger of the two of us.\f
As the most powerful Trainer and as
the Pokémon League Champion...\f
I, Lance the dragon master,
accept your challenge!\f
HGSS.519.0001:
Lance: I’ve been waiting for you.\f
[0103,0000,0000]!\f
I knew that you, with your skills,
would eventually reach me here.\f
There’s no need for words now.\f

As the most powerful Trainer and as

I, Lance the dragon master,
accept your challenge!\f
HGSS.519.0002:
...Whew.\f
You have become truly powerful,
[0103,0000,0000].\f
Your Pokémon have responded to your
strong and upstanding nature.\f
As a Trainer, you will continue to
grow strong with your Pokémon.\f
HGSS.519.0003:
...Whew.\f
You have become truly powerful,
[0103,0000,0000].\f
Your Pokémon have responded to your
strong and upstanding nature.\f
As a Trainer, you will continue to

HGSS.519.0005:
Mary: Oh, no! It’s all over!
Professor Oak, if you weren’t\r
so slow...\f
HGSS.519.0006:
Professor Oak: Ah, [0103,0000,0000]!
It’s been a long while.\r
You certainly look more impressive.\f
Your conquest of the League is just
fantastic!\f
Your dedication, trust, and love for
your Pokémon made this happen.\f
Your Pokémon were outstanding, too.\f
Because they believed in you as a
Trainer, they persevered.\f
Congratulations, [0103,0000,0000]!\f

HGSS.519.0008:
Mary: Let’s interview the brand-new
Champion!\f
HGSS.519.0009:
Lance: This is getting to be a
bit too noisy...\f
[0103,0000,0000], could you come with me?\f
